# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Library                                               | Version | Supported          |
| ----------------------------------------------------- | ------- | ------------------ |
| [node](https://github.com/nodejs/node)                | 24.12.0 | :white_check_mark: |
| [svelte](https://github.com/sveltejs/svelte)          | 5.55.2  | :white_check_mark: |
| [typescript](https://github.com/microsoft/typescript) | 6.0.2   | :white_check_mark: |
| [pnpm](https://github.com/pnpm/pnpm)                  | 11.1.3  | :white_check_mark: |
